title: crotalaria tsavoana
intro: Crotalaria tsavoana, also known as Tsavo rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used in various parts of Africa for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria tsavoana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
